programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Widowmaker: Part 2
programme.desc: Sig fights to survive a massive heart attack. Bill learns a dark secret about his son. Josh fights to prove himself. Jake learns a valuable lesson. Johnathan appeals to the gods.

programme.desc: Intense weather and more damage to his battered boat take a toll on Sig's heart. The USCG attempts a dangerous medevac. Bill struggles with a water leak. Jake recruits an old friend.

programme.desc: Sig fights to survive a massive heart attack. Bill learns a dark secret about his son. Josh fights to prove himself. Jake learns a valuable lesson. Johnathan appeals to the gods.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood and Guts
programme.desc: Winter season rages on. Blood is shed on the Time Bandit, a fight breaks out on the Wizard, the Northwestern grapples with a burnt out boat and a lost bet leads to cod guts on the Brenna A.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Life or Death Decision
programme.desc: A rogue wave forces Zack to make a life or death decision. Against his co-captain and crew, Josh bets on a Bering Sea myth. Giant seas roll Sean Dwyer. Sig turns to daughter Mandy for help.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Lair of the River Wolf
programme.desc: The crew travels to Mongolia in search of taimen: the largest, most ferocious member of the salmon family. Reaching their target will involve a punishing combination of back-breaking mountain trails, treacherous rivers and uncooperative Mongolian horses.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: The Mahseer has been fished almost to extinction. Its last stronghold may be in the jungles of Borneo, an area controlled by the headhunting Dayak people. The boys will need to risk life, limb and maybe their heads to find if this rumor is true.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four friends begin a challenging jungle expedition in search of a giant golden dorado, possibly dwelling within a remote Bolivian river. To find their way there, they must conquer torrential rains, vicious insects and isolated tribes.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Ganges
programme.desc: India's mighty Ganges, a river revered by a billion Hindus as a living goddess, is in trouble. Jeremy Wade is on a 1,500-mile mission to investigate the problems first hand and discover what is being done to save this holy river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Danube
programme.desc: The Danube's scenic route through ten European countries has made it a tourist magnet. Poachers, invasive species and engineering projects have made it one of the most endangered rivers on Earth. Jeremy investigates what can be done to save it.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Amazon
programme.desc: The Amazon is the mightiest of all the rivers, but it is also under immense pressure. Jeremy Wade traces the epic migration of the dorado catfish and discovers the issues putting this great river at risk from leaking pipelines to impassable dams.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Mississippi
programme.desc: The mighty Mississippi is threatened on several fronts: from alien invaders pushing out iconic native fish, to vast blooms of green algae strangling life from the river. Jeremy meets scientists, fishermen and leaders fighting to save the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Yangtze
programme.desc: China's Yangtze River is threatened by overfishing, industrial pollution and the loss of iconic monster fish. Jeremy journeys upstream to find out if there are any fish left, and meets the heroes fighting for the future of the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Zambezi
programme.desc: Wild and unnavigable, Africa's Zambezi boasts the world's mightiest waterfall, heart-pounding rapids and man-eating crocs. From the upper reaches in Zambia to the delta in Mozambique, Jeremy investigates the threats to this mighty river.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: Movie: Friend Request
programme.desc: An attorney fights to save his marriage, career and life when he is stalked by an ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Origin Story
programme.desc: Controversial music mogul Suge Knight forms Death Row Records using business tactics. His intimidation becomes legendary. He partners with Dr. Dre to change Hip Hop forever.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: The Rise of Death Row
programme.desc: Dr. Dre discovers Snoop Dogg. Suge's Death Row team releases The Chronic and Doggystyle which are huge hits. Money pours in and everyone's lives change. Snoop faces murder charges.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Enter Tupac
programme.desc: We follow Tupac's transformation from street poet to activist then hard core gangsta rapper at Death Row. Tupac's legal trouble mount and he faces prison time. Suge declares war and East/ West beef escalates.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: East vs. West
programme.desc: Suge gets Tupac out of prison and All Eyez on Me is a massive hit. Despite success, Death Row faces huge setbacks when street violence at the label leads to Dre's departure before Tupac is shot in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Tupac dies and a gang war erupts in Compton. The once untouchable label crumbles as Suge's probation violation lands him in prison. Biggie is murdered in Los Angeles. The hip-hop community mourns and calls for peace.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Under Investigation
programme.desc: Retired LAPD Detective Greg Kading takes us through his investigation of Tupac's and Biggie's murders. The last remaining eye witness to Tupac's assassination comes forward. The legacy of Death Row.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sprinkles
programme.desc: Initially wary, Dre embraces throwing Bow's baby shower and wants it to be unforgettable. However, his plans are put on hold when Bow stops by the OB/GYN with a headache and discovers she is having complications.

programme.title: Black-ish: Juneteenth
programme.desc: The Johnsons go to Jack and Diane's school play about Columbus Day, and Dre is dismayed by the historically inaccurate way that the holiday is portrayed.

programme.title: Black-ish: Mother Nature
programme.desc: Bow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante and learns she is suffering from postpartum depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side while she works through it.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Teresa Lewis and Matthew Shallenberger
programme.desc: When a husband and his adult son are murdered during a violent home invasion, the search for the killers exposes an illicit romance and family betrayal no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: It was Easter Sunday. The Stock family celebrated at home. Hours later, gunshots turned their farmhouse into a house of horrors. There was an arrest but one tiny clue didn't fit. This case was far from being solved.

programme.title: Uncovered: The McMartin Family Trials
programme.desc: At first it appeared to be the biggest child abuse scandal in American history, setting off a nation-wide panic. After three separate trials it seemed like a hoax.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: Stephanie Bruner, mother and professional dancer went missing in the Colorado Mountains. With three viable suspects in mind, her complicated love triangle may have sealed her fate.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: Hannah Hill disappeared from her home in Akron, Ohio in the spring of 1999. One week later Hannah's body was found in the trunk of her own car on the side of the road.

programme.title: Dateline: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Melissa was sleeping right beside her husband when he was murdered in the middle of a chilling February night.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Debbie Hawk
programme.desc: When Debbie Hawk vanished, her friends and family were left searching for answers. Investigators discovered that before she went missing, Debbie planned to reveal secrets. Police wondered if silencing her was a motive for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: If Something Happens to Me
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously. Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A defensive husband fleeing justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy. Stephanie Bauer brings new insight to the decade-old case of the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vanished
programme.desc: Young nursing student Michelle Le had disappeared. Something drew her out to her car. As her loved ones launched a very public effort to find Michelle, investigators began their own methodical search.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala(D'Oh)cious

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Ice Age or Hell Fire?
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, explore North America to find evidence of the most powerful geological events the Earth has ever seen Ice Ages. Finding out how they have both carved the land but also moulded the life that lives on it.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Iceland Poison the Skies?
programme.desc: Martin and Liz explore Iceland to see if its volcanoes could spread global chaos in the future. Martin samples an insane motorsport on ashy slopes, and Liz has the dive of a lifetime between the continental plates of North America and Europe.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Europe Burn in Hell?
programme.desc: Biologist Liz Bonnin and Geologist Martin Pepper investigate the world's most dangerous volcano Mount Vesuvius only to discover that the three million people of Naples live in the shadow of another, much more deadly super volcano, called Campi Flegre.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Hawaii Sink L.A.?
programme.desc: Liz and Martin travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii to investigate how evidence of catastrophic events in its geological past reveal a pattern of destruction that stretches back millions of years.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Asteroid Armageddon
programme.desc: Martin and Liz investigate a giant asteroid impact that may have wiped out the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. Martin experiences the power of a NASA supergun, and Liz follows the geological clues to Mexico where she dives an underground river.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: How It's Made: Winter Jackets, Animation, Mushrooms, Gold Rings
programme.desc: Discover how winter jackets, animation, mushrooms and gold rings are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Holograms, Package Printing, Skin Cultures, Canned Corn
programme.desc: The process behind making holograms, package printing, skin cultures and canned corn is revealed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends Are Foes
programme.desc: Friendships can give us love and support, unless they turn toxic.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Bound by Murder
programme.desc: It's Christmas when a stranger walks into Deanna's grandmother's home, holding them hostage. On the run, he's left a bloody trail in his wake, borne from his obsession with a young mother.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Bound by Murder
programme.desc: It's Christmas when a stranger walks into Deanna's grandmother's home, holding them hostage. On the run, he's left a bloody trail in his wake, borne from his obsession with a young mother.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Shame of the Father
programme.desc: Two teenagers play with fire by entering into a secret relationship against a father intent on ending their storybook romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Avert Your Eyes
programme.desc: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Lt. Joe Kenda's first task is to shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene. Soon police close in on her killer, ending with a white-knuckle car and foot chase across Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When 71-year-old Orville Head passes away, no one questions the death of an elderly man with health problems. But when a tip comes in suggesting foul play, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself. Then...a corpse found floating in Monument Creek leads Kenda to a mysterious encampment on a nearby riverbank.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Time Bomb
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes at the Pikes Peak National Bank, it's up to rookie detective Joe Kenda catch the culprits.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Baby You're Mine
programme.desc: Two days before her due date, pregnant teen Amanda Howard gets into the car of a seemingly generous stranger she met online. But when her new acquaintance turns out to have a sickening plan, Amanda and her baby are left fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: 36-year old Indle King courts beautiful 18-year old Anastasia Solovieva online. She travels from her home in Kyrgyztan to Seattle to marry him, but her American dream turns into a nightmare when she realizes that Indle is not the man she thought he was.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: We'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Alvin Karpis
programme.desc: The Barker-Karpis gang was one of the longest-lived criminal gangs during the Depression Era.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Retreat Pool
programme.desc: A mountain lodge with incredible views is missing one thing: a pool. Brian and Paul Porter weather rain storms to give a family an amazing outdoor living area featuring a spa with a walk-up bar, swim jets and a fire basin.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Snack Attack
programme.desc: From pickles to tacos, nachos to nuts, we reveal the snackalicious snacks craved by Giada, Ted Allen, Alex Guarnaschelli, Curtis Stone and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crunchy
programme.desc: Duff, Claire and Brian discuss some of their favourite crispy foods to eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Totally Unexpected

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Grilled

programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention

programme.title: Movie: Bad Twin
programme.desc: Jen's twin nieces are sent to live with her when their mother Cassie ends up in psychiatric care. After discovering Jen's wealth, Cassie plots with the twins to get Jen to adopt them before murdering her.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Mom
programme.desc: A teen's birth mother suddenly reappears after her parents' have both died.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by a Killer
programme.desc: A single mother becomes estranged from her teenage daughter over a man. The mom discovers that her daughter has fallen in love with a sadistic killer and must try to save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Married to a Murderer
programme.desc: A simple woman marries a wealthy man and is brought into a world of luxury. However when they return to his family's old home, his brother's jealousy grows to include his new wife and everyone finds themselves in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Temperature Rising

programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blackout
programme.desc: During a blackout, Chandler is trapped with a beautiful model and Rachel meets Paolo.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Mrs. Bing
programme.desc: Chandler's mother stirs up controversy when she kisses Ross; Rachel tries writing a novel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Poker
programme.desc: When the guys are all playing poker, the girls decide it would be fun to join in. The guys have to teach them how to play the game. Except Monica who knows how to play and is a very competitive person, especially when it is up against her brother Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away

programme.title: George Lopez: George Finds Therapy Benny-ficial

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Lien on Me

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A frustrated robbery suspect doesn't like his attorney, and shows it with his fist; a judge and defendant have an unlikely tearful reunion; a look at one of the country's most dangerous courthouses; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Watch as an emotional trial leads to an all-out brawl outside a Massachusetts courthouse. Plus, a defendant assaults his own attorney and later, the mother of a murder victim forgives her son's killer.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A Russian man convicted of murder attempts an impossible escape from high security courtroom. A judge goes off on a disrespectful defendant and later, thieves drive a truck right into the lobby of a Texas courthouse.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge convicted of a felony is dragged from the courtroom; a man makes a desperate attempt to escape a courthouse after being told he's headed to prison; a defendant pays a heavy price for a profanity laced tirade aimed at a judge; and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family

programme.title: The Misery Index: When We Smash
programme.desc: We prove why online dating is dead, and an officer flasher and a clumsy partier battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: House: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: When a nun comes into the clinic with swollen arms, a rash and bleeding in her palms Dr. House's diagnosis is a bad allergy, not a stigmata.

programme.title: House: The Socratic Method
programme.desc: Dr. House tries to save a schizophrenic woman who has a deadly deep vein thrombosis.

programme.title: House: Fidelity
programme.desc: When a young woman falls ill with a rare disease, Dr. House and Dr. Wilson treat her for the possibility of breast cancer. But when the diagnosis fails to be the answer the woman lapses into a coma and Dr. House suspects she has contracted a rare disease.

programme.title: House: Poison
programme.desc: A high school student seems to have been poisoned.

programme.title: House: DNR
programme.desc: Jazz musician John Henry Giles believes he is dying and signs a DNR to avoid a slow death.

programme.title: House: Histories
programme.desc: Dr. Foreman believes a homeless woman is faking seizures in order to get a meal ticket.

programme.title: House: Detox
programme.desc: House takes Cuddy's challenge and goes off Vicodin for a week in exchange for no clinic duty for a month. A young car accident victim cannot stop bleeding and if the team can't figure it out, he will die in a matter of days.

programme.title: House: Sports Medicine
programme.desc: A rare case of bone loss ends the comeback plans for major league pitcher Hank Wiggen.

programme.title: House: Cursed
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy believes he is cursed after an Ouija board tells him he is going to die.

programme.title: House: Control
programme.desc: A billionaire causes upheaval at the hospital when he becomes Chairman of the Board.

programme.title: House: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The medical team try to stop a man's recurring strokes and save his life.

programme.title: House: Mob Rules
programme.desc: Dr. House and his team race to diagnose a member of the mob and get him well enough to testify and enter the witness protection program. Meanwhile, Cuddy works to convince Vogler of House's importance to the hospital.

programme.title: House: Heavy
programme.desc: While House ponders who should be fired, a 10-year-old is admitted for a heart attack.

programme.title: House: Role Model
programme.desc: At a high-level fundraiser, up-and-coming Senator Tom Wright becomes violently ill. Vogler pushes House to take the case and dangles a new incentive in front of him: deliver a speech on behalf of Vogler's company and save the whole team.

programme.title: House: Babies and Bathwater
programme.desc: House and his team scramble to discover what's causing brain and kidney dysfunction in a pregnant woman. After the diagnosis, the woman struggles with a heartbreaking choice: to save her life or that of her unborn child.

programme.title: House: Kids
programme.desc: While a meningitis scare overwhelms the resources and staff of Princeton-Plainsboro Teaching Hospital, House zeroes in on a single patient: a 12-year-old whose symptoms are similar to, but not quite right for, meningitis.

programme.title: House: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The medical team try to stop a man's recurring strokes and save his life.

programme.title: House: Three Stories
programme.desc: House's ex-girlfriend Stacy Warner returns, not to be with House, but to get his help for her ailing husband. While House decides whether or not to take the case, Cuddy instructs him to substitute for a sick professor and present a lecture.

programme.title: House: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: House insists he can handle things when Stacy, the woman he once loved, asks him to diagnose her husband.

programme.title: House: Acceptance
programme.desc: When a death row inmate mysteriously and suddenly collapses after hallucinating, House takes the case. Dr. Cameron refuses to treat the patient in protest and feels they should treat a cancer patient instead.

programme.title: House: Autopsy
programme.desc: A nine-year-old terminal cancer patient is brought in after a hallucinogenic episode. Dr. House and his team struggle to diagnose what caused the hallucination. The patient is forced to decide whether she wants to have a very risky experimental treatment.

programme.title: House: Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: A handyman falls from a roof and develops strangely darkened pinkies. Despite everything the team tries, the whole hand becomes infected and House is forced to amputate it.

programme.title: House: TB or Not TB
programme.desc: When Dr. Sebastian Charles is rushed to the hospital after collapsing, he determines that all the symptoms are from TB. However, Dr. House has a different opinion and requests additional tests.

programme.title: House: Daddy's Boy
programme.desc: Carnell, a college graduate, collapses at a graduation party from internal shocks and is rushed to the hospital. With his father Ken at his bedside it becomes apparent that the two have not been truthful with each other in their lives.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey, Taters And Dogs
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a righteous mashup of flavors. In Orlando, Fla. Joey Fatone is riding shotgun to a potato-centric palace, plus a trip to his very own hot dog hangout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Duos
programme.desc: In New York's Lower East Side, Guy is pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings to pig ears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Burgers and Beyond
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Steak Out, Italian-Style

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Too Hot to Cook
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and her buddy Faith Ford love to cook and test out recipes. Valerie decides to keeps things cool with a deliciously decadent lobster club sandwich and savory refrigerator pickles.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Marcela Valladolid kicks off a triple-threat meal with her grilled adobo rubbed chicken. Then, Jeff Mauro and Geoffrey Zakarian use the leftovers to make a jalapeno popper melt and chicken nicoise salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Camp Like a Girl
programme.desc: Trisha prepares caprese kebabs and quinoa corn chowder with shrimp, andouille sausage and pepper pouches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 10
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch where Ree's husband is hauling hay with his crew and Ree fixes a make-ahead dinner and treats. She starts with a pot of chunky chili, along with cheesy cornbread muffins with honey butter and layered summer garden salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Perfect Picnic
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is throwing a prairie picnic for her friends.

programme.title: The Kitchen: BBQ and A
programme.desc: The Kitchen answers all of your burning BBQ questions. Geoffrey Zakarian starts by sharing the best cut of steak for the grill with his Grilled Hanger Steaks with Roasted Garlic Romesco Sauce.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Al Fresco
programme.desc: Giada heads to Palm Springs with her daughter and her boyfriend for a weekend of fun in the sun. Giada makes them a poolside, al fresco feast with picnic pasta, make-your-own flank steak hoagies and almond butter brownies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Grilling
programme.desc: Ina Garten is fired up and sharing her advice for grilling and barbecuing like a pro. To start, hot coals work their magic on her Tuscan grilled Cornish hens, and she amps up the flavor on foolproof ribs with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: High-Roller Games
programme.desc: Money is no object for the four competing chefs as Guy Fieri declares it's High-Roller Night in Flavortown. First, Guy turns the GGG classic budget battle on its head by demanding the chefs spend over $60 when making their signature high-end dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Carnival Games
programme.desc: The market has been turned into a midway so that four carnival food chefs can compete for a jackpot worth up to $20,000. First, they try their luck spinning a wheel of chance for the ingredients in their fried classic. Next, chefs play Guy Fieri's arcade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Four grill masters hit Flavortown for some red-hot grillin' games. First, they must think small and fit all the ingredients for their hometown grilled special into ultra-tiny grocery bags. Next, they play a game of Grocery Golf.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Burgers 2
programme.desc: Four burger masters are ready to see how they stack up against each other in a contest worth up to $20,000. First, the chefs must shop for the ingredients for an over-the-top burger using an underwhelming, tiny bag.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi, School
programme.desc: Doug can't get enough of reliving his glory days when he runs into his ex-football coach.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Circle of Driving Again
programme.desc: It's a complete disaster when Murray takes Adam out for a driving lesson and they learn something new about Pops in the process. Meanwhile, Erica has a hard time making friends at her school and turns down a toga party invitation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Parents Just Don't Understand
programme.desc: Adam and Barry decide to write a song like the iconic 'Parents Just Don't Understand' and call it 'Dads Just Don't Care.' When they don't get the reaction they expect from Murray, the boys take appropriate steps to make amends.

programme.title: Roseanne: Past Imperfect
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan have different ideas about covering one of Dan's father's missed alimony payments. Meanwhile, new parents, Fred and Jackie, still can't figure out whether they love each other or not.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me
programme.desc: Ed is lying to Dan about the mental state of his mother, but Roseanne tries to get Dan to accept that the lie was really an act of kindness.

programme.title: Roseanne: I Pray the Lord My Stove to Keep
programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Skeleton in the Closet
programme.desc: It's Roseanne's favorite holiday, Halloween, and Leon's planning a 'gay' soiree at the diner. During the party, Roseanne is horrified to learn about a dark secret in Fred's past.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss
programme.desc: When DJ refuses to kiss a black girl in the school play, Dan broods over the source of DJ's racist attitudes. To everyone's surprise, Fred develops a close friendship with his mother-in-law, Bev.

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '94
programme.desc: Nana Mary's introduces her new husband at Thanksgiving.. Roseanne and Dan anxiously await the results from her prenatal test and learn that something may be wrong with the baby.

programme.title: Roseanne: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Waiting for the prenatal test results leave Roseanne and Dan in a panic. Emotions run high as Roseanne mulls over her pregnancy options and consequently excludes Dan from any paternal involvement.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Parenting Trap
programme.desc: DJ's poor performance in school requires him to take 'special' classes. Dan feels he is being shut out as a parent. Darlene learns something about David and his new girlfriend's relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window
programme.desc: A geriatric couple with a penchant for nudity has moved in next door. Darlene worries about how close Becky and David have gotten.

programme.title: Roseanne: My Name Is Bev
programme.desc: After being arrested for drinking and driving, Bev announces that she is an alcoholic. Roseanne fears that Bev may be lying to mitigate the repercussions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Bed and Bored
programme.desc: Feigning illness for preferential treatment, Roseanne claims the doctor has ordered a week of bed rest. However, her grand scheme quickly turns stale when she finds herself bedridden and bored. Jackie and Bev come to blows.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sisters
programme.desc: Fred's unhappy that DJ's spending all his spare time at Jackie's house. Becky and Darlene find common ground.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth
programme.desc: Jackie finds her love life with Fred to be predictable. Mark is jealous of David's academic success and takes it out on his new relationship.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Rock and a Hard Price
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rocking open house for a Trousdale party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes. Flagg struggles to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer, who questions if Flagg is the right fit for her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman Versus Fredrik
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts. Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!
programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Skinner's Sense of Snow

programme.title: Movie: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: Looking for enough cash to run away from neglectful parents, a teenager's boyfriend convinces her to break into a rich blind man's house. Accompanied by a friend, they learn the man is not as helpless as he seems. They have to fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: Nerve
programme.desc: A high school senior signs up for an online game called Nerve, where she completes dares for money. She is teamed up with a mysterious stranger and the game begins to get dangerous. She realizes that in order to survive the night, she'll have to win.

programme.title: Movie: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: A group of youths sets out to rescue their friends from the legendary Last City, a dangerous place that turns out to be the deadliest maze that they've faced it. Only those who survive the ordeal will finally get answers to their burning questions.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.title: Africa: Congo
programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Africa: Cape
programme.desc: Two great ocean currents, one cold and one warm, sweep around the continent's Great Cape.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
